configurations.name: frontend
runtimeArgs: set -e; mise trust -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; mise install >/dev/null; if [ ! -x node_modules/.bin/astro ]; then pnpm install; fi; if ! supabase status >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./infra/scripts/with-secrets.sh "${SECRETS_ENV:-local}" supabase start; fi; PORT="${PORT:-4321}" ./infra/scripts/with-secrets.sh "${SECRETS_ENV:-local}" pnpm exec astro dev --host "${ADE_DEV_HOST:-127.0.0.1}" --port "$PORT"
